surge.title: Dynamic Pricing (Surge)
surge.description: Manage multiplier zones for high-demand areas. Surge pricing applies to rides intersecting the zone.

admin.title: Noori Operations
admin.description: Admin control center for mobility, food, delivery, wallet, safety, and support.

hero.title: The Operating System for Modern Logistics in Afghanistan.
hero.subtitle: Noori combines AI-driven routing, real-time WebGL tracking, and premium fleet management into a single, unified ecosystem.

services.heading: Unrivaled Infrastructure. Intelligent Design.
services.subheading: Modular components designed to scale with your business needs, from local deliveries to international freight.
services.design_desc: Premium engineering meets aesthetic excellence in every component of our infrastructure.
services.logistics_desc: Freight management across borders with real-time customs integration.
services.parcel_desc: On-demand hyper-local delivery for businesses and individuals.
services.tracking_desc: High-fidelity WebGL visualization of every asset in your supply chain.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We're here to help. Send us a message and we'll respond as soon as possible.
contact.success_message: Your message has been received. We will get back to you shortly.

home.title:
Move Smarter.
Arrive Safer.
home.subtitle: The complete mobility and logistics platform. Real-time rides, deliveries, fleet management, and more — all in one super app.
home.footer_trust: Available on iOS, Android & Web • Trusted across Afghanistan
home.quick_explore_sub: Everything you need in one place
home.quick_ride_desc: Fast, safe, affordable rides with live tracking
home.quick_driver_desc: Earn with flexible hours and instant payouts

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to your next journey
howItWorks.step1_desc: Choose your ride or delivery, set pickup and dropoff, and confirm instantly.
howItWorks.step2_desc: We connect you with the nearest verified driver in seconds using smart matching.
howItWorks.step3_desc: Follow your driver live on the map. Arrive safely with full transparency.

cta.title: Ready to Experience Noori?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of Afghans moving smarter.

socialProof.title: Trusted by Afghans Across the Country
socialProof.subtitle: Real people. Real journeys. Real results.
socialProof.testimonial1_text: Noori is a lifesaver for late night classes. Safe drivers, fair prices, and the tracking gives such peace of mind.
socialProof.testimonial2_text: Delivery is fast and reliable. My packages always arrive on time. The drivers are professional.
socialProof.testimonial3_text: We use Noori for our corporate fleet and deliveries. The admin tools and real-time visibility are world class.

rides.title: Noori Rides
rides.subtitle: Safe, Fast Rides Across Afghanistan
rides.feature1_desc: Every driver background-checked and rated by the community.
rides.feature2_desc: 3D-powered real-time map shows exactly where your ride is.
rides.feature3_desc: Upfront pricing. No surprises. Cash or digital wallet.
rides.feature4_desc: Noori Pink: female drivers for female passengers.

delivery.title: Noori Delivery
delivery.subtitle: Reliable Parcel & Food Delivery
delivery.features_title: Fast, reliable deliveries for every need
delivery.feature1_desc: From hot meals to important documents, delivered fresh and secure.
delivery.feature2_desc: Watch your courier navigate the city in our immersive view.
delivery.feature3_desc: Choose when you need it — minutes or hours ahead.
delivery.feature4_desc: Integrate dispatch and tracking directly into your systems.
